_comment: Display glass reflection bake. lit_rect mirrors src/ui/panels.rs (wf_left=30, master_y=42, wf_width=348, wf_height=56). Drift caught by tests/chassis_layout_check.rs.

material._comment: Principled BSDF: near-black base + low roughness so the only visible thing is the studio-light reflections. Specular tint warms the highlight slightly to match the chassis hammertone bake.

lights._comment: Single broad cool fill over the upper portion of the display. The previous warm key (upper-left) was dropped per user feedback — only the right-side cool reflection remains, but extended leftward so it now spans most of the upper half. Target = straight down for axis-aligned horizontal projection.
lights.name: DispFill
